app.name: AriaType
hero.title: Voice Typing
hero.description: Press a hotkey, speak, and your words appear at the cursor. Local-first, privacy-first, and works offline.
home.privacyByDesignSubtitle: Local-first means your voice stays on your device—by default.
home.privacyPoint0Description: Speech and text are processed locally. Your dictation never leaves your device.
home.privacyPoint1Description: Download and start typing right away.
home.privacyPoint2Description: You can opt in to help improve AriaType. Default is off.
features.title: Everything you need for voice-driven desktop work
features.subtitle: Speak naturally, use the current window as context, and turn rough thoughts into text you can send, save, or keep editing.
features.privacyDescription: Everyday voice content stays on your device by default. Remote services are optional and explicit.
features.voiceDescription: Speak at your own rhythm. AriaType is designed around pauses, silence, and everyday noise.
features.hotkeyDescription: Start from the app you are already using, without opening a dashboard or moving your work.
features.insertDescription: Your words land in the active field, with no clipboard step and no copy-paste loop.
features.polishDescription: Clean up rough speech, remove fillers, fix punctuation, and shape text for the current task.
features.multilangDescription: Work across Chinese, English, Japanese, Korean, and more in daily notes, replies, prompts, and documents.
features.pillDescription: A tiny on-screen indicator shows recording state. Drag it anywhere, or hide it entirely.
features.howItWorksSubtitle: A short voice interaction, kept inside the app where you work.
features.step0Description: Trigger AriaType from the app you are already using.
features.step1Description: Say the rough thought while AriaType handles pauses, silence, noise, and context.
features.step2Description: Release and the result lands at the cursor, ready to send, save, or keep editing.
features.ctaTitle: Add a voice layer to your desktop.
features.ctaSubtitle: Download AriaType and try voice-driven writing, input, and cross-app work.
download.title: Download for desktop
download.subtitle: Free to download. No account.
download.description: Download the best fit for your device right away. Other installers and release notes stay available when you need them.
download.chooseTitle: Pick the installer that matches your device
download.chooseDescription: If we can detect your platform, the most relevant build is highlighted. You can still choose another package when you need a different machine or deployment flow.
download.detectedMacHint: The recommended macOS build is highlighted so you can download with one decision instead of checking file names manually.
download.detectedWindowsHint: Windows packages are listed with their installer formats so you can choose the one that fits your environment.
download.detectedOtherHint: If you are downloading for another machine, use the platform sections on the right and choose the package you need.
download.primaryMetaFallback: Device not detected. Open the list to choose another installer.
download.platformMacDescription: Separate Apple Silicon and Intel builds are listed when available. Use the recommended option if you want the safest default for this device.
download.platformWindowsDescription: Windows installers stay in the same quiet layout so the page feels like the product, not a storefront.
download.releaseNotesDescription: Release notes stay visible on the page so you can quickly scan what changed before installing.
download.noRelease: No download is available yet. Please check back later.
homePage.heroTitle: Voice-driven writing, input, and cross-app work for your desktop.
homePage.heroDescription: Hold a shortcut, say what is on your mind, and AriaType turns spoken thoughts into context-aware text right where your cursor is.
homePage.heroFootnote: Reply, take notes, draft prompts, and clean up documents without leaving the app you are already using.
homePage.preview.title: A voice layer that stays in your workflow
homePage.preview.description: AriaType is built around the active app, current cursor, and current window, so speech becomes usable text where the work is already happening.
homePage.preview.idleDescription: The pill stays out of the way until you need to capture something.
homePage.preview.recordingDescription: A minimal on-screen indicator confirms capture without taking over the screen.
homePage.preview.transcribingDescription: Speech becomes usable text and returns to the cursor, without copy and paste.
homePage.principles.cursorDescription: Speak once and keep working in the app you already opened. No side window, no copy and paste.
homePage.principles.privateDescription: Everyday voice content stays on your device by default. Remote services are optional and explicit.
homePage.principles.desktopDescription: AriaType can use the current window to make polished text better fit the app, field, and task.
homePage.workflowDescription: A short voice interaction turns rough thoughts into text that is ready to use.
homePage.steps.triggerDescription: Start from the app you are already using. No dashboard, no context switch.
homePage.steps.speakDescription: Speak naturally. AriaType handles pauses, silence, everyday noise, and writing context.
homePage.steps.insertDescription: The result lands where your cursor already is, ready to send, save, or keep editing.
homePage.controlsTitle: Designed for your desktop, not a single input box
homePage.controlsDescription: AriaType works with the app, field, and cursor in front of you, so voice becomes part of the desktop instead of another place to move your work.
homePage.controls.engineDescription: Speak at your own rhythm. AriaType is designed for real rooms, natural pauses, and daily use.
homePage.controls.polishDescription: Turn rough speech into replies, notes, prompts, summaries, or formal text.
homePage.controls.hotkeyDescription: System-level access stays visible and deliberate, so the product feels trustworthy instead of magical.
homePage.summaryTitle: A desktop voice layer you can actually keep open
homePage.summaryDescription: Local-first defaults, your own services when needed, multilingual writing, and a small floating window that stays out of the way.
homePage.summaryUseCases: Replies, notes, prompts, documents, summaries, and everyday text entry across the apps you already use.
homePage.closingTitle: Add voice to the work in front of you.
homePage.closingDescription: No account is required. Local-first by default. Speak naturally and keep the output in your current app.
homePage.heroImageAlt: A warm workspace with natural light
homePage.featureImageAlt: Natural mountain scenery through a window
homePage.visual.roughSpeech: Rough speech: reply to Maya about tomorrow's launch notes
homePage.visual.contextOutput: Sounds good. I will clean up the launch notes tonight and send you the concise version tomorrow morning.
privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.content: AriaType is designed with your privacy in mind. By default, we do not collect, store, or transmit your voice data, transcribed text, or any personal information. Speech recognition and text processing are performed locally on your device using offline models. No account is required to use the application.
termsPage.title: Terms of Service
termsPage.content: By downloading and using AriaType, you agree to these terms. The software is provided 'as is', without warranty of any kind, express or implied. In no event shall the authors or copyright holders be liable for any claim, damages or other liability, whether in an action of contract, tort or otherwise, arising from, out of or in connection with the software or the use or other dealings in the software.
home.speedTitle: Type at the Speed of Thought
home.speedSubtitle: Voice input is 3-5x faster than typing. Speak naturally and watch your ideas flow.
home.speedNote: Average typing speed vs. natural speaking speed
home.whySubtitle: Built different. Privacy-first, local-first, and always free.
home.whyPoint0Description: Your voice never leaves your device. All speech recognition runs locally using Whisper and SenseVoice models.
home.whyPoint1Description: AGPL-3.0 licensed. No subscriptions, no hidden costs. Download, use, and even modify the source code.
home.whyPoint2Description: Choose between Whisper and SenseVoice engines. Switch models based on your needs—from tiny (75MB) to large (3GB).
home.whyPoint3Description: Optional local LLM cleans up filler words and fixes grammar. Runs offline using Qwen models.
home.whyPoint4Description: Works on macOS and Windows. Linux support coming soon. One tool, all your devices.
home.whyPoint5Description: Download and start using immediately. No sign-up, no login, no tracking.
home.privacyCompareSubtitle: See the difference between cloud-based and local-first voice typing
home.openSourceSubtitle: Built in the open, for everyone
home.openSourcePoint0Description: Fully open source. Inspect the code, contribute, or fork it for your needs.
home.openSourcePoint1Description: Your data stays local. Switch or stop using anytime without losing anything.
home.openSourcePoint2Description: Built with feedback from users who care about privacy and freedom.
home.openSourcePoint3Description: Core features are completely free. Download and use all local features at no cost.
home.feature0Desc: Global hotkey, press to speak and release to type. Works in any macOS app, Windows in development.
home.feature1Desc: Remove fillers, formal style, concise text, AI prompts, custom rules. Turn casual speech into professional writing.
home.feature2Desc: 100+ languages auto-detect, Chinese optimized. Interface supports 10 languages including Chinese/English/Japanese/Korean.
home.feature3Desc: Whisper (100+ languages) + SenseVoice (Chinese optimized). Switch between dual engines freely.
home.feature3Engine1Feature: Chinese optimized, faster and more accurate
home.feature4Desc: IT/Law/Medical domain recognition enhancement. Custom vocabulary support, add specialized terms.
home.feature4CustomVocab: Add your specialized terms to make recognition understand your professional field better
home.feature5Desc: 100% offline processing, no network required. No account, zero data collection. Voice never leaves device.
home.feature5Point0Desc: No network required, all processing on device
home.feature5Point1Desc: Zero data collection, no registration required
home.feature5Point2Desc: Voice data never leaves device, absolutely secure
home.freeDesc: Completely free · Open Source · No Subscription · No Ads · No Limits
home.freePoint0Desc: Code is open source, contributions and audits welcome
home.freePoint1Desc: Download once and use forever, no subscription fees
home.freePoint3Desc: No usage limits, no feature restrictions
home.aiPolish0Tagline: One click to delete "um" "uh" "like", fix obvious grammar errors
home.aiPolish0Input: Um, I think, like, we can meet tomorrow?
home.aiPolish1Tagline: Turn casual speech into professional writing instantly
home.aiPolish2Tagline: Keep key information, remove redundancy, be concise
home.aiPolish2Input: I think we should consider this issue
home.aiPolish3Tagline: Generate structured prompts from voice, perfect for ChatGPT/Claude
home.aiPolish3Input: Help me write a sorting algorithm
home.aiPolish4Tagline: Write custom instructions, customize your polish style
home.feature0Item2Desc: Works in any app on macOS or Windows
